title: Add business information section from Google Maps listing

requirements.summary: Create a new business information section below the map displaying details from the Google Maps listing
acceptanceCriteria: A new section is added below the map section in App.tsx
The section displays business information extracted from the Google Maps listing
Information is presented in an organized, readable format consistent with the medical-themed design
The section uses the same OKLCH color system and styling as existing sections

file_operations.description: Add a new business information section below the existing Google Maps section. The section should display business details including business name (Ghuge Medicals), category (Medical supply store), address (Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduwadi-413208), and any available description or details. Use card-style layout with consistent styling matching existing sections, utilizing the medical-themed OKLCH color variables (primary, secondary, accent) and maintaining the green and white color palette. Structure the content with proper headings and organized information display.

requirements.summary: Update the Google Maps iframe to use exact coordinates from the provided Google Maps link
acceptanceCriteria: The iframe src URL is updated with coordinates matching the Google Maps link location
The embedded map displays Ghuge Medicals at Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduwadi-413208 correctly
The map marker is positioned at the exact location from the shared link

file_operations.description: Update the Google Maps iframe src attribute to use the coordinates from https://maps.app.goo.gl/Py3ZHuvGRmuYgHkw5. Extract the latitude and longitude from the Google Maps link and update the iframe embed URL to ensure the map displays the precise location of Ghuge Medicals at Choriya Township Bypass Road, Kurduwadi-413208 with an accurate marker placement.
